descriptions.admin: Full system access with complete control over all settings, users, and data. Recommended for business owners and IT administrators only.
descriptions.manager: Can view all data and manage operators. Has access to reports and limited settings. Cannot manage billing or roles.
descriptions.operator: Access limited to their own operator's sites. Can view transactions, create tickets, but cannot modify settings.
descriptions.siteManager: Limited to assigned site only. Can manage daily operations, view CCTV, and create tickets.
descriptions.support: Customer support access. Can view customers, tickets, transactions, and process refunds. Cannot modify settings.
descriptions.viewer: Read-only access to dashboards, reports, and data. Cannot make any changes to the system.

quickInvite.newOperatorDesc: Invite a new operator partner with access to their own sites
quickInvite.siteManagerDesc: Invite a site manager for a specific location
quickInvite.supportStaffDesc: Invite support staff with customer service permissions
quickInvite.viewerDesc: Invite a read-only viewer for reports and dashboards
